docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GRACE, PAULA AS TO DEFENDANT BIBBO, SAAB DBA BIBBO UNION SQUARE BEAUTY SALON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED NOV-23-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BIBBO, SAAB DBA BIBBO UNION SQUARE BEAUTY SALON
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-04-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-04-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF PAULA GRACE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SAAB BIBBO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRACE, PAULA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BIBBO, SAAB DBA BIBBO UNION SQUARE BEAUTY SALON THE EVIDENCE FAILED TO SUPPORT A CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT, PERSONALLY, OR THAT DEFENDANT FELL BELOW PROFESSIONAL STANDARDS IN THE HAIR RELAXING TREATMENT OF PLAINTIFF'S HAIR. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
